args.code: (() => { try { const scripts = [...document.querySelectorAll('script')].map(s => ({src: s.src, type: s.type})); const loadedScripts = scripts.filter(s => s.src.includes('index-')); return {scripts: loadedScripts, allScripts: scripts.slice(0,5), baseURI: document.baseURI, locationHref: window.location.href}; } catch(e) { return {error: e.message}; } })()
